'''Carosi VII''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Carosus system]]. Following the expansion of [[Carosi]] into a [[Red giant/Legends|red giant]], Carosi VII became a [[Temperature/Legends|hot]], [[Swamp/Legends|swampy]] planet that was deemed suitable for colonization by the [[Carosite]]s at a later date. It was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by a single [[Moon/Legends|moon]].

*<!-- 1992-06-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Two]]''
